context: ›  membranous labyrinth »  enhancement: labyrinthitis, Cogan syndrome (early phase of autoimmune interstitial keratitis), intralabyrinthine schwannoma, site of postinflammatory perilymphatic fistula »  obliteration: labyrinthitis ossificans, Cogan syndrome (late phase) »  hemorrhage: trauma, labyrinthitis, coagulopathy, tumor fistulization »  Ménière disease (vertigo + fluctuating sensory sensorineural hearing loss) ◊  Thin-section MR is the modality of choice!
